name: Food Park Manager
short_description: Build and manage your own Food Park! Customize food stalls, hire staff, and cater to hungry customers as you find the perfect recipes. Decorate your park to attract and satisfy more customers.
detailed_description:
Food Park Manager is a cozy, casual, tycoon game where you build and manage your own food park! Design your own cozy food destination, filled with a wide variety of stalls and entertainment. Expand your park, hire staff, host events, and unlock new cuisines as you transform a simple piece of land into a bustling food park!

FEATURES

🌟 Build and Design Your Park

Design your very own food park! Choose from a wide range of stalls offering cuisines from around the world. Place benches, decorations, and entertainment facilities to create a cozy atmosphere. You’ll unlock more customization options as your park grows.

🍔 Perfect Your Recipes

Perfecting each dish is key to keeping your customers satisfied. Every cuisine has a perfect recipe that will increase your sales and customer satisfaction. But customer tastes can also change based on dynamic events, so you'll need to keep up by tweaking your recipes.

👨‍🍳 Hire and Manage Staff

Hire cooks to prepare delicious dishes, cleaners to keep your park spotless, and entertainers to keep the mood lively. You can also hire managers to automatically handle your ingredient stocks. Each staff member comes with their own unique skills and personalities. Promote employees to increase their work efficiency but also their salary.

🎉 Adapt to Dynamic Events

From food festivals and viral online recipes, to a sudden influx of cute dogs, your food park is always buzzing with excitement! Adapt to changes in your customer's needs and preferences so they stay happy and keep your park thriving. Each event presents unique opportunities and challenges.

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain
